purpose: Repair and refresh the qwen W7 daily-brief tracker section-completeness gap left by Stream 23, with exactly one real bounded strict qwen attempt.
scope: One qwen/qwen3.5-9b specialist tracker run with --strict-final and no fallback synthesis; LM Studio local only; no direct paid API calls.

runtimeBefore.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 227 MiB used, 7761 MiB free, 0% utilization

codeChanges: Moved Token & Speed ahead of Recommended Actions in the required section order to avoid the Stream 23 truncation pattern where Recommended Actions was cut off before Token & Speed.
Tightened the tracker final prompt to require exact headings first, concise section budgets, and Token & Speed before the action list.
Allowed pending placeholders in the model's Token & Speed section because exact prompt/completion/tps/duration metrics are recorded by the tracker artifact after the model final completes.

dryRun.command: uv run python scripts/daily-brief-tracker.py --dry-run --use-specialist --strict-final --max-steps 1 --query "stream 27 no-load section check"
dryRun.result: dry_run smoke passed before qwen load

realRun.modelLoadResult: Model loaded successfully in 17.61s at 6.10 GiB.
realRun.command: uv run python scripts/daily-brief-tracker.py --model qwen/qwen3.5-9b --use-specialist --strict-final --max-steps 4 --query "JamiStudio/local-evals current Stream 27 W7 repair: summarize exact pushed evidence from Streams 16-26; include the sections Web Signals, GH / Repo Activity, Harness Placement Notes, Token & Speed, Recommended Actions; use repo files under docs/evals and results plus valid gh repo view fields; do not use stale Stream 9-only wording"
realRun.webSearchObservation: Two web_search calls returned No web results.
realRun.githubObservation: Valid gh repo view fields returned name, description, stargazerCount, updatedAt, and url.

improved: The strict model final is nonblank and includes all five required sections.
The run used repo-file reads and valid GitHub fields with no tool failures.
remainingCaveats: The model's own Token & Speed section contains pending placeholders; the authoritative token/speed metrics are in the JSON artifact.
The Recommended Actions include some overbroad or poorly scoped suggestions, including a full Stream 27 W7 matrix wording that was not part of this stream.
The brief is still subject to human review for factual quality, relevance, and acceptability versus baselines.
qualityAssessment.verdict: Stream 27 closes the narrow Stream 23 section-completeness gap for the strict qwen tracker, but W7 quality acceptance remains user-review gated.

runtimeAfterUnload.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 227 MiB used, 7761 MiB free, 0% utilization

w7QualityAcceptance: section-completeness repaired; final acceptance still user-review gated
remainingGaps: Broad/full local matrix coverage remains incomplete.
31B Q4_K_M practical proof remains estimate-timeout only and 31B-QAT practical evidence remains timeout-only.
Broad partial-profile measurements remain incomplete outside contained slices.
Qwen uncached current-suite throughput remains incomplete.
Final two-verifier completion audit remains pending.
